# pip-audit vulnerability allowlist
#
# Add vulnerability IDs here to ignore them in CI gating (one per line).
# Prefer upgrading dependencies first. If you must ignore, include a short reason and
# a link to tracking context in a comment.
#
# Examples:
#   # false positive: not reachable in our usage (tracked in <link>)
#   GHSA-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx
